dependency: Ruby and Bundler installed at Decidim-compatible versions.
PostgreSQL available for app and backups.
acceptanceTest: Database create, migrate, backup, restore pass.
Upload/variant processing test passes with fake asset.

dependency: Node version checked against Decidim dependency needs.
acceptanceTest: Assets compile without warnings that affect runtime.

dependency: Queue worker and scheduled tasks configured.
Email disabled, sandboxed, or domain isolated.
acceptanceTest: No real email can send in fake-data rehearsal.

dependency: Role matrix for Barayamal, Toastmasters guest, reviewer, admin.
acceptanceTest: Fake role assignment and revoke proof passes.

dependency: Sample content and fake accounts only.

acceptanceTest: Export/delete/archive proof passes with fake data.

dependency: Secrets manager or equivalent local rule.
acceptanceTest: No secrets in repo, logs, public package, or screenshots.

dependency: Audit log policy and monitoring route.
acceptanceTest: Critical admin actions are logged and reviewable privately.
Critical participant flows pass basic accessibility QA.
No-go status can be published without private evidence.

dependency: CSV/JSON backlog for manual or GitHub import.
acceptanceTest: P0/P1 tickets have owner, blocker, and acceptance test.
Fake admin can complete common tasks without developer help.
